mnemonics.title: Point Operations Summary: BCENTGL
mnemonics.content: Brightness, Contrast, Equalization, Negative, Threshold, Gamma, Log -- 'Bright Cameras Enhance Neat Things Greatly, Logarithmically'

mnemonics.title: Gamma Direction
mnemonics.content: gamma < 1 = Lighter (Less than one = Light), gamma > 1 = Greater darkness. Think: 'Less gamma, Less dark'.

mnemonics.title: Histogram Equalization Steps: HCNM
mnemonics.content: Histogram, CDF, Normalize, Map -- 'How Can Nurses Map' patient vitals? Same way we map pixel values through the CDF.

mnemonics.title: Contrast Formula
mnemonics.content: O = alpha * I + beta: Alpha = Amplify (contrast), Beta = Bias (brightness). Both start with their effect's first letter.
